description: A pair of round-toed, black formal shoes with slip-on and low-top stylingSynthetic leather upper with overlay and stitched detail, has a zip closure on either sides of the tongue for easy insertion of foot, reinforced heel collarCushioned footbed with branding on the heel Tough outsole with patterned grooved and a stacked heelWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
